title: Diphasium heterophyllum
taxonomy: Diphasium heterophyllum is classified as a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. This family consists of club mosses, a group of vascular plants that are thought to be one of the earliest lineages of land plants. The Lycopodiaceae family is further classified into several genera, with Diphasium being one of them. Diphasium heterophyllum is specifically classified as a species of the genus Diphasium, which is native to Australia and New Guinea. The classification of Diphasium heterophyllum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Lycopodiaceae family.
